name: Product sense (thin slice)
description: Identifies user pain; proposes smallest valuable slice; balances value/effort/risk.

levels.label: Emerging
behavioral_indicators: Jumps to features; weak user grounding

levels.label: Solid
behavioral_indicators: Can map problems to features; limited prioritization

levels.label: Strong
behavioral_indicators: Proposes thin-slice experiments; clear success metrics

levels.label: Exceptional
behavioral_indicators: Sees leverage; reframes problem to unlock outsized value
